title: polystichum nepalense
intro: Polystichum nepalense, also known as Nepal holly fern, is a species of fern native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polystichum nepalense include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying and processing the leaves, which can be consumed as tea, capsules, or infused in oil for topical application.
